input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-b4c277536f5d4c159d5ae63056ea0d18 && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:Debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release /bl:Release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE DONE---"
arguments.description: Build project in Debug and Release with binlogs

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. The binlog files are ready:

- **`Debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build log
- **`Release.binlog`** — Release configuration build log

You can analyze them with `dotnet build` replay (`dotnet msbuild Debug.binlog`) or open them in the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
